# Synthetic fixture — Claude Code tool-approval prompt. Anchors on the
# canonical "Do you want to proceed?" phrase, which is stable across
# approval variants (Bash, Task, etc.).
#
# Expected: classify_activity -> "waiting", detect_mode -> "default"

⏺ Bash(rm -rf /tmp/build)
  ⎿  The agent wants to run: rm -rf /tmp/build

  Do you want to proceed?
❯ 1. Yes
  2. Yes, and don't ask again for Bash commands
  3. No, tell Claude what to do differently

─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── session ──
❯
───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  hardinge@Mac ~/workspace main
  ⏵⏵ bypass permissions on (shift+tab to cycle)
